files.patch:
@@ -876,0 +876,6 @@
+  else
+    LIBFREETYPE_LIBS := -lfreetype
+  endif
+  # on 32b, the old  msvsc do not understand inline, unluckily there is
+  # wrong detection in freetype 2.14 to use only __inline in such case
+  ifeq ($(TOOLCHAIN_TYPE), microsoft)
@@ -877,2 +883,0 @@
-      # on 32b windows, the old  msvsc do not understand inline, unluckily
-      # there is wrong detection in freetype 2.14 to use only __inline in such case
@@ -881,2 +885,0 @@
-  else
-    LIBFREETYPE_LIBS := -lfreetype
